settings.ticker_text: (415) 555-1234 // hello@sandstone.com // San Francisco, CA // Mon - Fri: 9AM - 6PM //

settings.text: We are a multidisciplinary interior design studio dedicated to creating timeless interiors that enhance living spaces and inspire everyday experiences.

settings.sidebar_text: Purposeful in vision. Meticulous in craft. Bold in innovation.
settings.intro_heading: At our core is a belief in creative intention. Every space, every material, every design choice — it all matters. Because in a world saturated with options, we believe thoughtful design wins.
settings.intro_body: We're not just interior designers — we're thinkers, creators, and collaborators. Our team blends global trends with personal sensibility, crafting spaces that feel authentic yet inspiring.

settings.description: Over 500 interior design projects have been successfully completed, each one transforming spaces into beautiful, functional environments.
With more than 15 years of experience in the interior design industry, we have honed our skills in creating timeless and modern spaces.
We have served over 200 happy clients, building lasting relationships through our commitment to quality, creativity, and exceptional design solutions.
Our work has been recognized with over 50 awards, celebrating our innovative approaches and outstanding contributions to design excellence.

settings.text: At Sandstone, we believe great interior design creates environments that nurture and inspire. Our approach blends timeless principles with contemporary innovation, ensuring every space serves its inhabitants while telling a unique story.

settings.sidebar_heading: A proven methodology that transforms visions into beautiful interiors through collaboration, creativity, and meticulous attention to detail.

settings.title: Discovery
settings.description: Every project begins with discovery. We explore your vision, assess your space, and understand your lifestyle so we can create interiors that truly reflect your personality and needs.

settings.title: Design Development
settings.description: Design development drives the creative process. Our interior designers work closely with you through mood boards, material samples, and 3D visualizations.

settings.title: Communication
settings.description: Throughout the process, we maintain open communication and detailed planning. Regular check-ins, design presentations, and feedback sessions keep us aligned.

settings.title: Implementation
settings.description: As we move from design to implementation, our focus shifts to execution and quality. Careful material sourcing, artisan coordination, and on-site supervision.

settings.heading: Real partner stories, brought to life through creativity, strategy, and brand experiences that stick.

settings.quote: Sandstone transformed our home into a sanctuary that perfectly blends modern comfort with timeless elegance. Their attention to detail and sustainable approach exceeded our expectations.
settings.author: Sarah Johnson

settings.quote: Working with Sandstone on our office redesign was incredible. They created a space that boosts productivity while maintaining a warm, inviting atmosphere for our team.
settings.author: Michael Chen

settings.quote: The boutique hotel project with Sandstone was a masterpiece. They understood our vision perfectly and delivered interiors that tell a story and create unforgettable experiences.
settings.author: Emma Rodriguez

settings.heading: Explore our latest articles and insights on design, technology, and creative innovation

settings.title: The Art of Sustainable Design
settings.description: Exploring how sustainable materials and thoughtful design create spaces that are both beautiful and environmentally responsible.

settings.title: Minimalism in Modern Interiors
settings.description: How the principles of minimalism are reshaping contemporary interior design and creating more intentional living spaces.

settings.title: Color Theory for Living Spaces
settings.description: Understanding how color choices influence mood, perception, and the overall experience of a designed environment.
